name: Generate Fibonacci Function
prompt: Write a TypeScript function called 'fibonacci' that takes a number n and returns the nth Fibonacci number. Use recursion with memoization for efficiency.
expected_behavior: Function should include: function signature, recursive logic, memoization, TypeScript types

name: Generate isPrime Function
prompt: Write a TypeScript function called 'isPrime' that takes a number and returns true if it's prime, false otherwise. Include edge cases for numbers less than 2.
expected_behavior: Function should handle edge cases, use efficient algorithm, include types

name: Fix Buggy Code
expected_behavior: Should identify off-by-one error (i <= arr.length should be i < arr.length)

name: Complete Partial Function
expected_behavior: Should implement splitting, finding max length, and returning result

name: Multi-File Feature Implementation
expected_behavior: Should add method to UserService class, use correct types, handle not found case

name: Binary Search Implementation
prompt: Implement a binary search function in TypeScript that takes a sorted array of numbers and a target value, returning the index if found or -1 if not found.
expected_behavior: Should use binary search algorithm (not linear), handle edge cases, include types
